content.p: In time of emergency declared by the President or by the Congress, and in time of war, the President is authorized, in the President’s discretion, to suspend the operation of all or any part of the provisions of law pertaining to promotion of commissioned officers of the Administration.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 853i(b) of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 107–372.
